extensionDescription.message: Detects video streams (MP4, M3U8, DASH) and downloads them with FDM.

emptyMsg.message: No stream detected. Try playing the video.

contentAlert.message: Please use the FDM icon in your toolbar to see all detected streams (including HLS/M3U8).

optShowButtonDesc.message: Displays an elegant floating download button on hover over supported video players (HTML5).

optMinSizeDesc.message: Ignores tiny videos (e.g. ads, sound effects, icons) to capture only real media. Prevents list clutter!

optSubtitlesDesc.message: Detects and adds linked subtitle files to the captured streams list, allowing you to save them separately.

optHiddenStreamsTitle.message: Deep Scan for Hidden Streams (JS Sniffer)

optHiddenStreamsDesc.message: Dynamically analyzes the active page's DOM and scripts to extract hidden video URLs (.m3u8, .mp4, etc.) otherwise invisible to classic methods.

cartEmptyMsg.message: No media found on the page.
